input.command:
cat >> memory/findings.md << 'EOF'

## DAY 2026-03-22 (TW=1253.89, -54 BAD)
RESULTS: 120805 Trump plan via=PAKISTAN (had Oman, -16.08; cross-ref 584240 Pakistan-mediator MISSED); 581783 news org=AL JAZEERA AGAIN (had BBC 0.35, -18.69; 2nd time after 196640); 554489=Montreal(-4.57); 718848=Khiam(-5.41); 740952 air force=Colombian (0.14#3, +0.17 Brier but -9.34 TW late-fix-Israeli-top-held-long).
*** CRYSTALLIZED LESSONS: (1) "which NEWS ORG" Q -> Al Jazeera is TOP candidate (resolution-source bias; 196640+581783 both Al Jazeera). (2) Iran-US mediator -> PAKISTAN strong (584240+120805). (3) Apply correct reasoning EARLY - late fixes barely help TW (earlier days dominate). ***
EOF
python3 -c "
import csv
csv.field_size_limit(10**7)
ids={'262505','698278','494140','757107','912807'}
with open('market.csv') as f:
    r=csv.DictReader(f)
    for row in r:
        if row['qid'] in ids:
            print('==',row['qid'],'|',row['title'][:92])
            print('  BG:', row['background'][:130])
            print('  MY:', row['my_prediction'])
"
